_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, scope change management, and executive status reporting.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.391), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.387).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.261). Shared vocabulary: [execution]. DCWF-only terms [contribute, cyberspace, exords, orders] vs WIDAI-only terms [change, coordination, executive, issue, manage, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.836 (P=0.841, R=0.832). Balanced P/R — the 6-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (91.6%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Contribute to cyberspace Execution Orders (EXORDs)." and "Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, s". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.401 > STS 0.261 (gap +0.141). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [execution] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.0%. Shared tokens: [execution]. DCWF-only: [contribute, cyberspace, exords, orders]. WIDAI-only: [change, coordination, executive, issue, manage, management].
